title: MachineLearningAdvisor
summary: A local + deployed web app at `/Users/macbook/Documents/MachineLearningAdvisor`, published to shinyapps.io (karpeles account). Built 2026-04-16 as an extension of Karpathy's LLM wiki pattern, adding a RAG layer to overcome the scalability limits of pure index-based navigation at ~100+ documents.
